title: Peat
description: Adds Peat, a muddy fuel source found in swamps.
body:
A simple forge mod for Minecraft: Java Edition 1.20.1 adding peat, a muddy soil block found in swamps. As well as being a good building block for terraforming projects, it can also be used as a furnace fuel in a pinch. Be careful though: the block is highly flammable. You can find it in swamps and mangrove swamps pretty commonly.

![Peat generating in swamps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9fb03c5c28342faaebcc669c520634c6f271360.png)

![Peat generating in mangrove swamps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b732a608ed836b70ddc1cc085ca764645e20825.png)

![Peat as fuel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ffa0afe9a4e34786f87fc5fc06706465a19b05.png)

Feel free to use this mod in modpacks.
